title: The Straw Hats Inside a Giant Mystery
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Luffy as The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.
scene: The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: PLEASE FORGIVE US!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We weren't thinkin'!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It was a foolish mistake!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is a deadly poison.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: see to it that straw hat luffy takes this within a month!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It causes intense pain. Blood erupts from the victim till they finally die.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can overlook this if your boss takes responsibility.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's not way we could do that to Luffy-Seanpai!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What?! boss!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Stop, Boss!! You're gonna die!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: GULF GULF

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll kill you and make your blood spurt out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: THAT'S FINE BY ME!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy-Sewpai never asked us to share that sake or take up his flag!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I ain't gonna get him involved in my mess!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His time is Too Precious... To waste on someone like me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm good bein' just another scrub who got killed tryin' to show up an emperor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aww man, I wish I coulda seen Luffy- Senpai become pirate King!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DAM it all!! I threw that chance away like an idiot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's up to you guys now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: BOSSS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: See you around...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...Guys.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wow!! They just left us be!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Let's get as FaaAR away as possible!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like that poison was a fake; it wouldn't have hurt Luffy-senpa! At all!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought the emperors were meant to be ruthless!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He was softer than I expected!!

summary: This part advances the Arrival in Elbaf through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
